context: 390x844 light/dark screenshots show a mobile heading losing its final word at the right edge with no ellipsis.

findings.evidence: 390-light screenshot: heading 'Architect...' chopped mid-word by the hero container's overflow:hidden edge, no ellipsis present
findings.fix: Add text-overflow: ellipsis or increase container width/line-height so the heading is not chopped mid-character.
